nasb.text: Now the king of Aram was warring against Israel; and he counseled with his servants saying, “In such and such a place shall be my camp.”

esv.text: Once when the king of Syria was warring against Israel, he took counsel with his servants, saying, “At such and such a place shall be my camp.”

cnv.text: 亞蘭王與以色列人打仗，他和他的臣僕商議，說：“我要在某處某處埋伏。”

ccb.text: 亚兰王与以色列人交战，他和臣仆商议要在某处安营。
